result.summary: Found several visual layout issues, mainly content being clipped or partially hidden at the right edge and bottom of the viewport.

issues.description: The game card grid appears to overflow horizontally. A third column of cards is only partially visible on the right side, making the layout look cut off rather than intentionally responsive.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the responsive grid for this viewport, such as using two full columns, adding proper horizontal carousel affordances, or ensuring the container does not exceed the viewport width.

issues.description: The top category navigation is clipped on the right. The 'Hot Ga...' tab is only partially visible, so the label cannot be read fully.
issues.suggestion: Make the category row clearly horizontally scrollable with proper padding/fade indicators, or reduce tab widths so complete labels fit within the viewport.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the lower game tiles visible behind it, making the bottom content look partially obscured.
issues.suggestion: Add sufficient bottom padding to the scrollable content equal to the bottom nav height so game cards are not hidden underneath it.

issues.description: Some carousel/navigation controls, especially the right banner arrow, sit very close to the screen edge and look slightly cramped or clipped.
issues.suggestion: Add more horizontal inset or ensure carousel controls remain fully inside the safe content area.
